original_image_tags: Black-and-white scan of a typed report page on dark, textured paper. The page is marked "RESTRICTED" in stamped or printed white text at the top right and bottom center. Two hole-punch circles are visible on the left edge. Two additional hole-punch circles are visible at the bottom edge. A handwritten number "46" appears in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: Two large, faded, stamped text elements reading 'RESTRICTED', one near the top right and one near the bottom center. A small handwritten number '46' is visible in the bottom right corner.

judge.reason: Both sides agree on the 'RESTRICTED' stamps and handwritten '46', but Description A adds details about hole-punch circles and paper texture that Description B omits.
